text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 10 

CTSTRPHC_CVRG_CD 

LABEL: Catastrophic Coverage Code 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether the PDE occurred within the catastrophic benefit phase of the 
Medicare Part D benefit, according to the source PDE. 

When the value equals C (above attachment point), then the PDE is in the catastrophic phase. When 
the value equals A (attachment point),
